name: Find Before You Fine-Tune: A Diagnostic Study of Small LLMs for Cybersecurity QA
summary: arXiv:2607.18725v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly fine-tuned for critical-domain Question-Answering (QA), yet choosing which small model to adapt, befo...
description: arXiv:2607.18725v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly fine-tuned for critical-domain Question-Answering (QA), yet choosing which small model to adapt, before paying the cost of adaptation, remains difficult. Fine-tuning can improve domain alignment, but it may also erode prior knowledge, weaken instruction-following, or increase hallucination, especiall...
author: Shaswata Mitra, Subash Neupane, Trisha Chakraborty, Himanshu Tripathi, Sudip Mittal, Aritran Piplai, Shahram Rahimi
